field_specs.chunk_id: Unique chunk id. Recommended format: chunk.<node_id>.<card_type>.v<version>
field_specs.node_id: Stable leaf node id from the knowledge tree
field_specs.node_kind: Leaf node type: concept, formula, method, or application
field_specs.review_role: core leaves are default review units; supporting leaves are usually expansion targets
field_specs.binding_role: primary_allowed can be the main wrong-question binding target; secondary_only is auxiliary
field_specs.title: Human-readable card title
field_specs.path: Full tree path, from root to leaf
field_specs.is_primary: Whether this card is the leaf's primary retrieval target
field_specs.text: Flattened retrieval text for embedding/BM25. Must restate title, path, core content, common errors, and review cue

concept_card.purpose: Represents a concept that should be understood, recognized, and distinguished from nearby concepts

formula_card.purpose: Represents a formula or rule that has expression, conditions, and special cases

method_card.purpose: Represents a stable solving procedure or transferable method

generation_rules: Every leaf node must generate at least one primary card
Primary cards are the default retrieval units for first-pass RAG
Supporting method leaves should usually use binding_role=secondary_only
The text field should be self-contained enough to work without reading sibling cards
Structured fields should be preserved even when text is embedded
Future extensions such as example_card and error_card can be added without changing the current base fields
